comment.body: My point is clearly write your bias, update it when market dynamics changes..it is okay if your bias proves wrong..she had earlier called it as a bull trap but since US-china deal she didn’t clearly mention if this bull trap is over or not. I sometimes feel that Alma is too scared to make a call in a fear that it may go wrong & that’s why prefer to keep silent. That’s when I start to loose a trust in her a little bit.
